prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年四川大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约22252名、15976名、17313名、10686名、17940名，整体波动较大。2024年位次大幅前移至10686名， 2025年又明显后移至17940名，近两年呈现\"大小年\"特征；2025年基准位次约17940名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年210人、2022年207人、2023年213 人、2024年212人、2025年230人；2026年综合组计划186人，较2025年减少44人，缩招约19%，幅度显著。缩招意味着名额减少，对位次有上移（更难进）的推动作用。 四川大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第16名，近年稳定在Top20以内，属于国内顶尖综合性大学，对高分考生吸引力持续 强劲。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年高考周期内声誉评价为\"明显负面\"，事件总数51条（负面46条），主要涉及师德师风（教师被联名举报学术不端）、学校管理回应等舆情事件， 可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制效应，位次有下移（更易进）的潜在空间。抖音热度排名第35（较热），综合热度约131万，在985高校中处于中等偏上水平。历史投档异常 方面，2022年（中关注）和2023年（高关注）均出现投档线大幅下降信号，尤其2023年新闻学类专业在山东省位次下降3607位；第五轮学科评估中四川大学拥有 19个A-及以上学科，包括口腔医学A+、中国语言文学A+、护理学A+、临床医学A、数学A、化学A、生物学A、药学A、软件工程A、轻工技术与工程A、马克思主义理论A等，学科实力 极为雄厚，对考生有强大吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据尚未生成，参考2023–2024年趋势：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、口腔医学、临床医学持 续高热推荐；新闻传播、生化环材、土木建筑明显劝退。山东省2026年高考报名总数约72万人，较2025年68.1万人增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模持续扩大，整体竞争加剧。 山东省普通类一段线近年稳定在440分左右（2025年441分），未出现大幅波动；四川大学位于四川省成都市，在山东省属于跨省招生。2025年该校 在山东省招生109人，占全国总招生598人的约18.2%，是该校第二大生源省份（仅次于江苏省），说明山东考生对川大有较高的认可度和报考意愿。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年 基准位次17940名、2026年综合组大幅缩招约19%（名额减少推高位次上移）、山东省考生总数增加约5.7%（竞争加剧推高位次上移）、声誉负面舆情（抑制报考热度推低位次下移 ）等多重因素，缩招与考生增加的叠加效应略强于声誉负面，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所前移（更难进），但受负面舆情制约前移幅度有限。预测最低位次约16082名 ，波动区间15582–16582名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Sichuan University in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 22252, 15976, 17313, 10686, and 17940, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2024, the ranking moved sharply forward to 10686, and in 2025, it moved noticeably back to 17940, exhibiting a 'big year, small year' pattern in recent two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 17940. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong's comprehensive category was 210 in 2021, 207 in 2022, 213 in 2023, 212 in 2024, and 230 in 2025; the comprehensive group plan for 2026 is 186, a decrease of 44 from 2025, a reduction of about 19%, which is significant. A reduction in enrollment means fewer spots, pushing the ranking upward (harder to enter). Sichuan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 16th, and has been stable within the top 20 in recent years, belonging to the top-tier comprehensive universities in China, with sustained strong appeal to high-scoring students.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', with a total of 51 events (46 negative), mainly involving teacher ethics and style (teachers jointly reported for academic misconduct), school management responses, and other public opinion events, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' willingness to apply, with potential for the ranking to move downward (easier to enter). Douyin popularity ranking is 35th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.31 million, at an upper-middle level among 985 universities. In terms of historical admission anomalies, both 2022 (medium attention) and 2023 (high attention) showed signals of a significant drop in admission lines, especially in 2023 when the Journalism major's ranking in Shandong Province dropped by 3607 places; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Sichuan University has 19 A- or above disciplines, including Stomatology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Clinical Medicine A, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Biology A, Pharmacy A, Software Engineering A, Light Industry Technology and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, etc., with extremely strong disciplinary strength, which has a strong attraction for candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 major popularity data has not yet been generated; refer to the 2023–2024 trends: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Stomatology, and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly recommended; Journalism and Communication, Biology-Chemistry-Environment-Materials, Civil Engineering and Architecture are clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) from 681,000 in 2025, with the candidate scale continuing to expand, intensifying overall competition. The first-tier line for Shandong Province's regular category has been stable around 440 points in recent years (441 points in 2025), with no significant fluctuations; Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, and recruits across provinces in Shandong. In 2025, the university enrolled 109 students in Shandong, accounting for about 18.2% of the total national enrollment of 598, making it the second largest source province (after Jiangsu Province), indicating that Shandong candidates have a high recognition and willingness to apply to Sichuan University.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 17940, the significant reduction in the 2026 comprehensive group enrollment by about 19% (fewer spots pushing the ranking upward), the increase in the number of candidates in Shandong Province by about 5.7% (intensified competition pushing the ranking upward), and the negative reputation public opinion (suppressing application enthusiasm pushing the ranking downward), the combined effect of enrollment reduction and candidate increase is slightly stronger than the negative reputation, so the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to move forward compared to 2025 (harder to enter), but the forward movement is limited due to the negative public opinion. The predicted minimum ranking is about 16082, with a fluctuation range of 15582–16582.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted minimum ranking is about 16082, with a range of 15582–16582. Candidates with rankings within the range (approximately 15500–16600) can use Sichuan University as a sprint/core target: Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, etc.) require rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within about 15500) to sprint; for Tier 2 majors (Electrical Engineering, Law, Engineering Experimental Class, etc.), candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 16000) can focus on filling; Tier 3 majors (Engineering Experimental Class, Public Administration, etc.) are suitable for candidates with rankings near the upper bound of the range (about 16500) as a safety choice. It is recommended to make a comprehensive decision based on personal interests, discipline evaluation levels, and social popularity, prioritizing Sichuan University's top-tier A-level disciplines such as Stomatology, Chinese Language and Literature, and Computer Science.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 四川大学医学类在山东省近五年最低录取位次分别为：2021年6525位、2022年7235位、2023年9675位、2024年16013位、2025年13684位。招生计划方面，2021年29人、2022年27 人、2023年35人、2024年46人、2025年32人，呈现先扩后缩的波动特征。2026年医学类计划招生33人，较2025年增加1人，扩招幅度约3.1%，对位次产生轻微的推高效应（位次数 字增大）。从位次序列看，2021—2024年位次持续大幅下滑（从6525降至16013），2025年出现明显反弹（回升至13684），反映出医学类专业在经历2024年大幅扩招导致的位次骤 降后，2025年缩招引发位次回升。2026年计划微增1人，扩招力度有限，对位次的推高作用较弱。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列。其华西医学中心历史悠久、声誉卓著，口腔医学、临床医学等学 科长期处于国内顶尖水平，对山东考生具有极强的吸引力。985平台和双一流身份赋予毕业生在深造、就业等方面的显著优势，是考生报考的重要考量因素。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来在全国范围内持续高热，山东省作为高考大省，考生对优质医学资源的追求尤为突出。四川大学华西医学品牌在山东认可度极高，口腔医学、临床医学等核心 专业竞争激烈。2026年医学类在山东招生33人，招生规模适中，新增基础医学（拔尖计划）和临床医学（启德班）等特色班型，进一步丰富了专业选择，预计将维持较高的报考热 度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及历年位次趋势分析，2026年四川大学医学类在山东省最低录取位次预测为13741位，较2025年的13684位略有下降（位次数字减小57位，意味着门槛略 有降低），主要原因是2026年计划微增1人，扩招幅度较小，叠加2025年已出现明显反弹，反弹动能有所减弱，位次趋于小幅回落。预测区间为13397—14085位，建议考生在此区间 内合理规划志愿。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间内，建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底。一档专业竞争极为激烈，需位次远高于预测值才有把握；二档专业位次适中，与预测位次较为匹配；三档专业门槛 相对较低，适合作为稳妥保底选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Sichuan University's medical programs in Shandong Province over the past five years are: 6525 in 2021, 7235 in 2022, 9675 in 2023, 16013 in 2024, and 13684 in 2025. In terms of enrollment plans, there were 29 students in 2021, 27 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 46 in 2024, and 32 in 2025, showing a fluctuating trend of first expansion and then contraction. In 2026, the medical programs plan to enroll 33 students, an increase of 1 student compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 3.1%, which has a slight upward effect on rankings (ranking numbers increase). From the ranking sequence, rankings continued to decline significantly from 2021 to 2024 (from 6525 to 16013), but rebounded noticeably in 2025 (rising to 13684), reflecting that after the sharp drop in rankings caused by the large expansion in 2024, the contraction in 2025 led to a rebound. In 2026, the plan increases by only 1 student, with limited expansion intensity, resulting in a weak upward effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, ranked among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, with comprehensive strength among the top in the country. Its West China Medical Center has a long history and outstanding reputation, with disciplines such as Stomatology and Clinical Medicine consistently at the top domestic level, exerting strong appeal to Shandong candidates. The 985 platform and Double First-Class status provide graduates with significant advantages in further education and employment, making it an important consideration for candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs have been consistently hot nationwide in recent years. As a major province for the college entrance examination, Shandong candidates have a particularly strong pursuit of high-quality medical resources. Sichuan University's West China Medical brand is highly recognized in Shandong, with core programs like Stomatology and Clinical Medicine facing intense competition. In 2026, medical programs will enroll 33 students in Shandong, with a moderate enrollment scale. New special class types such as Basic Medicine (Top Talent Program) and Clinical Medicine (Qide Class) have been added, further enriching program choices, and it is expected to maintain high application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and historical ranking trend analysis, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Sichuan University's medical programs in Shandong Province in 2026 is 13741, slightly lower than the 2025 ranking of 13684 (ranking number decreases by 57, meaning a slightly lower threshold). The main reason is the slight increase of 1 student in the 2026 plan, with a small expansion amplitude, coupled with the significant rebound already seen in 2025, the rebound momentum weakens, and rankings tend to decline slightly. The prediction range is 13397 to 14085, and it is recommended that candidates plan their applications reasonably within this range.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the prediction range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety. Tier 1 programs are extremely competitive and require rankings far above the predicted value to be secure; Tier 2 programs have moderate rankings and are more aligned with the predicted ranking; Tier 3 programs have relatively lower thresholds and are suitable as a safe backup choice.
